entity.summary: DeFi infrastructure company and protocol ecosystem that includes an active Polygon DEX surface with current liquidity, fees, and recent trading volume.
entity.notes: Modeled as hybrid because the current parent organization provides broader DeFi infrastructure while the historical and still-active Cometh DEX surface continues to show current on-chain trading activity. The ComethSwap candidate row is consumed under this parent entity.

evidence.title: Cometh official website
evidence.notes: First-party site identifies the current Cometh DeFi infrastructure business and trading/liquidity capabilities.

evidence.title: Cometh protocol profile and current DEX metrics
evidence.notes: Protocol profile reports current Polygon TVL, fees, and recent 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume.
